research_gate: C2, C3A and GP1 are complete. C4V source, seven adversarial tests and independent candidate review are green; broad C4, C3B, D4 and R1 remain unchanged.
authority_lane: Owner-authorized isolated C4V engine-neutral persistence proof only. No broad C4, production filesystem/database/cloud, save slots, runtime, cache, population, multiplayer, merge, CRDT, clocks, compaction, deletion, generic migration, GP2/GP3 expansion, C3B, Greenfield, authentication or Kernel mutation.
context_health: C4V is recorded from clean GP2 closure a55391d. Source, result, focused tests, module integration, workspace regression, independent candidate acceptance and registered gate run-fa6334a300e04d409dd5cddb4f22542e are current. GP3 is queued only.

macro_findings: C4V is an additive first-consumer sibling and does not close or narrow broad C4.
C2, C3A and GP1 provide sufficient identity, causal-world and fixed-loop seams.
GP3, GP4, runtime, C3B, D4, R1 and Greenfield remain separate.
Independent candidate review accepted the bounded C4V implementation after semantic replay and whole-log bound hardening.
Registered complete gate run-fa6334a300e04d409dd5cddb4f22542e passed in 511311 ms; GP3 remains queued only.
micro_findings: Every append must cover one exact typed GP1 stable stop to the next stable stop atomically.
Retry identity is decided before stale revision and changed same-ID commands conflict.
Restart must externally revalidate C3A/session evidence and reconstruct byte-identical GP1 state, ledger, log, head and hashes.
Snapshot never deletes events and the sole migration changes only codec/adapter dependency identity.
Seven focused adversarial tests, 54-module context verification and the complete workspace Rust suite pass.

visual_quality_gate.rationale: C4V readiness and persistence proof are typed and engine-neutral with no admitted visual asset.

tiers_completed.result: C2/C3A/GP1 authority and broad-C4 exclusions define one bounded first-consumer persistence problem.
The design freezes stable identities, atomic command semantics, strict restart/snapshot and one codec-only migration fixture.
Seven adversarial tests prove all five sessions, semantic replay before retry/append, framed migration/rollback and strict authority-negative receipts.

simulation_ladder.unresolved_risk: Production storage, runtime integration, GP3 and GP4 remain intentionally unimplemented and separately gated.
simulation_ladder.expected_information_gain: Complete; the registered gate preserved the accepted C4V result across the integrated repository.
simulation_ladder.estimated_cost: Complete; no additional C4V execution is authorized.
simulation_ladder.regression_guard: No broad C4, GP3/GP4, runtime, filesystem/database/cloud, Greenfield or C3B authority.
simulation_ladder.stop_condition: Stop after C4V proof closure and reassess before GP3 or GP4.
simulation_ladder.final_integration_gate: Passed in registered run-fa6334a300e04d409dd5cddb4f22542e after focused C4V, independent candidate acceptance and workspace regression.

exit_criteria.label: Exact C2/C3A/GP1 identities and stable-stop batches are immutable and atomic.
Restart, retry, conflict, stale, gap, fork and corruption semantics fail closed.
Snapshot is replay-equivalent and nondeleting; one codec-only migration preserves GP1 bytes and rollback.
C4V adds no production storage, runtime, broad C4, GP3/GP4, C3B, Greenfield or Kernel mutation authority.

unresolved_risks: production storage and runtime remain separately gated
GP3 and GP4 remain queued and unimplemented
broad C4, C3B, D4, R1 and Greenfield remain unchanged

retain strict replay/restart and byte-identical ledger/log reconstruction
retain nondeleting snapshot and one codec-only migration/rollback fixture
retain broad C4, GP3/GP4, runtime, C3B, Greenfield and production-storage exclusions
verification_plan: seven adversarial tests and semantic hardening verified
isolated reference crate and module integration verified
run exactly one registered complete gate and record closure
resume_after: C4V is closed. Await explicit owner authorization with GP3 queued only; do not start GP3 or GP4.

GP4 now depends on C4V plus GP3 while C5/C6, D4, R1 and C3B retain their existing routes.
The isolated crate, seven adversarial tests, 54-module integration, workspace suite and independent candidate acceptance pass.
